productDisplayName: Puma Men Graffiti Navy Blue Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed spread collar with a three button chest placket, short sleeves with embroidered puma cat on the left sleeve, and distressed graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash and iron inside-out Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron With a sporty touch, this Graffiti Polo T-shirt from puma makes for a perfect casual wear. Crafted from soft cotton, this T-shirt is sure to offer exemplary comfort, while the distressed print on the front is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
